---
title: "MANGO Publication Figures"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(igraph)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(here)
library(scales)
library(ggrepel)
library(RColorBrewer)

source(here("R", "stats.R"))
source(here("R", "sampling.R"))
source(here("R", "auc.R"))

dir.create(here("figures"), showWarnings = FALSE)

theme_set(
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(strip.background = element_blank())
)

# Consistent palette
COL_MORAN <- "#2166AC"
COL_JC    <- "#B2182B"
COL_FRAG  <- "#808080"

save_fig <- function(stem, plot, width = 8, height = 6) {
  ggsave(here("figures", paste0(stem, ".png")), plot,
         width = width, height = height, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(here("figures", paste0(stem, ".pdf")), plot,
         width = width, height = height)
  invisible(plot)
}
```

```{r load-shared}
g         <- readRDS(here("networks", "largest_subgraph_undirected.rds"))
bin_cache <- readRDS(here("networks", "degree_bin_cache.rds"))
```

---

## Figure 1 — Method Schematic

```{r fig1-placeholder}
# Figure 1 will be produced in Inkscape / Illustrator.
#
# Two-panel layout:
#   Panel A (Tier 1): gene set on network → degree-bin assignment →
#                     permutation null → Moran's I distribution → p-value
#   Panel B (Tier 2): induced subgraph → component jackknife →
#                     gene-level jackknife
#
# Placeholder — no R output for this figure.
message("Figure 1: schematic produced externally.")
```

---

## Figure 2 — FPR Calibration Across Bin Count

```{r fig2-data}
# Confirmed columns: n_total, method, n_reps, n_reject, fpr, mean_p
# Method naming: "GlobalMoran_dm_bins=<b>", "GlobalMoran_uniform",
#                "ICS_bins=<b>",
#                "Joincount_dm_bins=<b>", "Joincount_uniform"
fpr_raw <- readRDS(here("results", "synthetic_s3_fpr_summary.rds"))

fpr2 <- fpr_raw |>
  filter(n_total == 200) |>
  mutate(
    stat = case_when(
      grepl("^GlobalMoran", method) ~ "Moran's I",
      grepl("^Joincount",   method) ~ "Join Count",
      grepl("^ICS",         method) ~ "Fragmentation",
      TRUE ~ method
    ),
    bins = case_when(
      grepl("uniform", method) ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ as.integer(gsub(".*bins=(\\d+).*", "\\1", method))
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(bins)) |>
  arrange(stat, bins)

# Verify
cat("stat values:", paste(unique(fpr2$stat), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("bins range:", range(fpr2$bins), "\n")
```

```{r fig2-plot}
fig2 <- ggplot(fpr2, aes(x = bins, y = fpr, colour = stat, group = stat)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed", colour = "black",
             linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 10.2, y = 0.05, label = "α = 0.05",
           hjust = 0, vjust = -0.4, size = 3.2) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.85) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10, limits = c(1, 10.8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.05), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1)) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Moran's I" = COL_MORAN,
               "Join Count" = COL_JC,
               "Fragmentation" = COL_FRAG),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(x = "Number of degree-matching bins (B)",
       y = "False positive rate at α = 0.05") +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.82, 0.82),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "grey80",
                                         linewidth = 0.3))

fig2
save_fig("fig2_fpr_calibration", fig2, width = 6, height = 4.5)
```

---

## Figure 3 — Degree Control Is Free (S7 Power Grid)

```{r fig3-data}
# Confirmed columns: K, signal_frac, method, auc
# K: 100, 200, 500 | signal_frac: 0.05, 0.10, 0.20, 0.40
# Methods present: GlobalMoran_dm_bins=10, GlobalMoran_uniform,
#                  ICS_bins=1, ICS_bins=10, Joincount_dm_bins=10, Joincount_uniform
deg_auc <- readRDS(here("results", "degree_typical_auc_table.rds"))

cat("Columns:", paste(names(deg_auc), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("K:", paste(sort(unique(deg_auc$K)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("signal_frac:", paste(sort(unique(deg_auc$signal_frac)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("methods:", paste(unique(deg_auc$method), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Panel A: AUC under 10-bin Moran's I
p3a_data <- deg_auc |>
  filter(method == "GlobalMoran_dm_bins=10") |>
  mutate(
    signal_pct = factor(paste0(signal_frac * 100, "%"),
                        levels = paste0(sort(unique(signal_frac)) * 100, "%"))
  )

# Panel B: ΔAUC = uniform AUC − 10-bin AUC
p3b_data <- deg_auc |>
  filter(method %in% c("GlobalMoran_dm_bins=10", "GlobalMoran_uniform")) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = method, values_from = auc,
              names_prefix = "auc_") |>
  rename(auc_10bin  = `auc_GlobalMoran_dm_bins=10`,
         auc_unif   = auc_GlobalMoran_uniform) |>
  mutate(
    delta_auc  = auc_unif - auc_10bin,
    signal_pct = factor(paste0(signal_frac * 100, "%"),
                        levels = paste0(sort(unique(signal_frac)) * 100, "%"))
  )
```

```{r fig3-plot}
p3a <- ggplot(p3a_data,
              aes(x = factor(K), y = signal_pct, fill = auc)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(auc, 2)), size = 3.5, colour = "white") +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "Blues", direction = 1,
                       limits = c(0.5, 1.0), name = "AUC",
                       oob = squish) +
  labs(x = "Set size (K)", y = "Signal fraction",
       title = "AUC (B = 10)") +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.line  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank())

p3b <- ggplot(p3b_data,
              aes(x = factor(K), y = signal_pct, fill = delta_auc)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", delta_auc)), size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "RdBu", direction = 1,
                       limits = c(-0.05, 0.05), name = "ΔAUC",
                       oob = squish) +
  labs(x = "Set size (K)", y = "Signal fraction",
       title = "ΔAUC (uniform − B = 10)") +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.line  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank())

fig3 <- p3a + p3b +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

fig3
save_fig("fig3_power_grid", fig3, width = 10, height = 5)
```

---

## Figure 4 — Single-Pathway Spiking

```{r fig4-data}
# Raw columns: pathway, pct_noise, label, rep, method, p_value, score, n_total
# pct_noise in {0,20,40,60,80,100}; label 1=signal, 0=null; nulls at pct_noise=100
sp_raw <- readRDS(here("results", "single_pathway_auc_raw.rds"))
mp_auc <- readRDS(here("results", "multi_pathway_auc_table.rds"))
pc     <- readRDS(here("pathway_info", "pathway_characterization.rds"))

# pw_short lookup from aggregated table (has pathway -> pw_short mapping)
sp_agg   <- readRDS(here("results", "single_pathway_auc_table.rds"))
pw_short_lu <- sp_agg |>
  distinct(pathway, pw_short) |>
  filter(!is.na(pw_short))

sp_deg <- pc |>
  select(pathway, mean_full_deg) |>
  rename(pathway_full = pathway)

# Compute per-noise-level AUC:
#   signal rows = label==1 at that pct_noise
#   null rows   = label==0 at pct_noise==100 (same pathway / n_total / method)
null_pool <- sp_raw |> filter(label == 0L, pct_noise == 100L)

sp_auc_noise <- sp_raw |>
  filter(label == 1L, pct_noise %in% c(0L, 20L, 40L, 60L, 80L)) |>
  group_by(pathway, n_total, method, pct_noise) |>
  group_modify(function(sig, key) {
    nulls <- null_pool |>
      filter(pathway == key$pathway,
             n_total  == key$n_total,
             method   == key$method)
    combined <- bind_rows(sig, nulls)
    if (sum(combined$label == 1L) < 1L || sum(combined$label == 0L) < 1L)
      return(tibble(auc = NA_real_))
    tibble(auc = roc_auc_from_p(combined, score_col = "score",
                                label_col = "label")$auc)
  }) |>
  ungroup()

cat("AUC rows:", nrow(sp_auc_noise), "\n")
cat("pct_noise:", paste(sort(unique(sp_auc_noise$pct_noise)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("n_total:",   paste(sort(unique(sp_auc_noise$n_total)),   collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

```{r fig4-plot}
# pct_noise 0→100% signal, 20→80%, 40→60%, 60→40%, 80→20%
stratum_pal <- c("High degree" = "#2166AC",
                 "Mid degree"  = "#74ADD1",
                 "Low degree"  = "#ABD9E9")

sp4 <- sp_auc_noise |>
  filter(method == "GlobalMoran_dm_bins=10") |>
  left_join(pw_short_lu, by = "pathway") |>
  left_join(sp_deg, by = c("pathway" = "pathway_full")) |>
  mutate(
    degree_stratum = case_when(
      mean_full_deg > 150 ~ "High degree",
      mean_full_deg > 80  ~ "Mid degree",
      TRUE                ~ "Low degree"
    ),
    degree_stratum = factor(degree_stratum,
                            levels = c("High degree", "Mid degree", "Low degree")),
    pw_label    = fct_reorder(coalesce(pw_short, pathway), mean_full_deg),
    signal_frac = (100 - pct_noise) / 100,
    K_label     = factor(paste0("K = ", n_total),
                         levels = paste0("K = ", sort(unique(n_total))))
  )

# 6 pathways → 6 linetypes (perfect 1-to-1 with R's default linetype set)
fig4 <- ggplot(sp4, aes(x = signal_frac, y = auc,
                        colour   = degree_stratum,
                        linetype = pw_label,
                        shape    = pw_label,
                        group    = pw_label)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.80, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50",
             linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ K_label, ncol = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.20, 0.40, 0.60, 0.80, 1.00),
    labels = paste0(c(20, 40, 60, 80, 100), "%")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.4, 1.0), breaks = seq(0.4, 1.0, 0.1)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = stratum_pal, name = "Degree stratum") +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "Pathway") +
  scale_shape_discrete(name   = "Pathway") +
  labs(x = "Signal fraction", y = "AUC",
       title = "Single-pathway spiking") +
  guides(colour   = guide_legend(order = 1, ncol = 1),
         linetype = guide_legend(order = 2, ncol = 1),
         shape    = guide_legend(order = 2, ncol = 1)) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.box      = "horizontal",
        legend.margin   = margin(t = 4, b = 4),
        strip.text      = element_text(size = 10))

fig4
save_fig("fig4_single_pathway_spiking", fig4, width = 10, height = 12)
```

---

## Figure 5 — Multi-Pathway Spiking (K = 200)

```{r fig5-mp-plot}
# mp_auc columns: pw_set, K, signal_frac, method, auc, roc
# K in {100, 200, 500}; signal_frac in {0.05, 0.10, 0.20, 0.40, 0.60}
profile_pal <- c("High degree"       = "#2166AC",
                 "Mid degree"        = "#74ADD1",
                 "Low degree"        = "#ABD9E9",
                 "Synthetic control" = "#808080")

# Full pathway composition labels for legend
set_full_labels <- c(
  "Set 1" = "Set 1: TCR / Insulin / Cadherin",
  "Set 2" = "Set 2: HRR / BCR / Clathrin",
  "Set 3" = "Set 3: VEGFR2 / Ca2+ / FCERI",
  "Set 4" = "Set 4: SCF-KIT / DAP12 / Phagocytosis",
  "Set 5" = "Set 5: Chromatids / Rho / Inflammation",
  "Set 6" = "Set 6: Olfactory / Neddylation / mTOR-AMPK",
  "Set 7" = "Set 7: Synthetic degree-typical (neg. control)"
)

# Linetypes: reuse within-group (color already separates degree groups)
set_lty <- c("Set 1" = "solid",   "Set 2" = "dashed",  "Set 3" = "dotted",
             "Set 4" = "solid",   "Set 5" = "dashed",
             "Set 6" = "solid",
             "Set 7" = "longdash")

set_shape <- c("Set 1" = 16, "Set 2" = 17, "Set 3" = 15,
               "Set 4" = 16, "Set 5" = 17,
               "Set 6" = 16,
               "Set 7" = 4)

mp5 <- mp_auc |>
  filter(method == "GlobalMoran_dm_bins=10") |>
  mutate(
    degree_profile = case_when(
      grepl("^Set [123]:", pw_set) ~ "High degree",
      grepl("^Set [45]:",  pw_set) ~ "Mid degree",
      grepl("^Set 6:",     pw_set) ~ "Low degree",
      grepl("^Set 7:",     pw_set) ~ "Synthetic control",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    degree_profile = factor(degree_profile,
                            levels = c("High degree", "Mid degree",
                                       "Low degree", "Synthetic control")),
    set_num   = as.integer(sub("^Set (\\d+):.*", "\\1", pw_set)),
    set_label = factor(paste0("Set ", set_num),
                       levels = paste0("Set ", 1:7)),
    K_label   = factor(paste0("K = ", K),
                       levels = paste0("K = ", sort(unique(K))))
  )

fig5 <- ggplot(mp5, aes(x = signal_frac, y = auc,
                        colour   = degree_profile,
                        linetype = set_label,
                        shape    = set_label,
                        group    = set_label)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.80, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50",
             linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ K_label, ncol = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.05, 0.10, 0.20, 0.40, 0.60),
    labels = paste0(c(5, 10, 20, 40, 60), "%")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.4, 1.0), breaks = seq(0.4, 1.0, 0.1)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = profile_pal, name = "Degree profile") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = set_lty,   labels = set_full_labels, name = "Set") +
  scale_shape_manual(values   = set_shape,  labels = set_full_labels, name = "Set") +
  labs(x = "Signal fraction", y = "AUC",
       title = "Multi-pathway spiking") +
  guides(colour   = guide_legend(order = 1, ncol = 1),
         linetype = guide_legend(order = 2, ncol = 1),
         shape    = guide_legend(order = 2, ncol = 1)) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.box      = "horizontal",
        legend.margin   = margin(t = 4, b = 4),
        strip.text      = element_text(size = 10))

fig5
save_fig("fig5_multi_pathway_spiking", fig5, width = 10, height = 14)
```

---

## Figure 6 — CRC GWAS Network Visualization

```{r fig6-compute}
#| cache: true
#| cache-path: "_cache/fig6"

gwas_raw    <- readRDS(here("data", "gwas_genes_crc.rds"))
gwas_on_net <- intersect(gwas_raw, V(g)$name)
cat("GWAS genes on network:", length(gwas_on_net), "\n")

# Prep shared structures
prep  <- prep_graph_fast(g)
A     <- prep$A
nodes <- prep$nodes

idx_full <- match(gwas_on_net, nodes)
x_full   <- integer(length(nodes)); x_full[idx_full] <- 1L
I_full   <- global_moran_I(A, x_full)
cat("I_full:", round(I_full, 5), "\n")

# Induced subgraph
gwas_subg  <- induced_subgraph(g, vids = gwas_on_net)
comp       <- components(gwas_subg)
art_pts    <- articulation_points(gwas_subg)
art_names  <- V(gwas_subg)$name[art_pts]
cat("Components:", comp$no, "| Largest:", max(comp$csize),
    "| Art. points:", length(art_names), "\n")

# Gene-level jackknife: ΔI_i = I_full - I_{-i}  (no permutations needed)
gene_jack <- vapply(gwas_on_net, function(gene) {
  reduced  <- setdiff(gwas_on_net, gene)
  idx_r    <- match(reduced, nodes)
  x_r      <- integer(length(nodes)); x_r[idx_r] <- 1L
  I_full - global_moran_I(A, x_r)
}, numeric(1))

gene_jack_df <- tibble(
  gene         = gwas_on_net,
  delta_I      = gene_jack,
  comp_id      = comp$membership[match(gwas_on_net, V(gwas_subg)$name)],
  comp_size    = comp$csize[comp$membership[match(gwas_on_net, V(gwas_subg)$name)]],
  is_art       = gwas_on_net %in% art_names,
  subg_deg     = degree(gwas_subg, v = gwas_on_net)
) |>
  arrange(desc(delta_I))

cat("Top 5 gene jackknife contributions:\n")
print(head(gene_jack_df[, c("gene", "delta_I", "is_art", "comp_size")], 5))
```

```{r fig6-layout}
# Non-singleton component IDs sorted largest → smallest
non_sing_ids <- sort(unique(comp$membership[comp$csize[comp$membership] > 1]))
comp_order   <- non_sing_ids[order(comp$csize[non_sing_ids], decreasing = TRUE)]
# comp_order: [1]=24-gene dominant, [2]=8-gene, [3]=3-gene, [4]=2-gene

large_comp  <- comp_order[1]
sec_comp_ids <- comp_order[-1]

# Named delta_I lookup (gene_jack is named by gwas_on_net from vapply)
di_named <- setNames(gene_jack, gwas_on_net)

# Scale pmax(delta_I, 0) to [smin, smax] within each component
scale_node_size <- function(gene_names, di_vec, smin = 4, smax = 15) {
  di  <- pmax(di_vec[gene_names], 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  hi  <- max(di, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (hi == 0) return(rep(smin, length(gene_names)))
  smin + (di / hi) * (smax - smin)
}

# Dominant component subgraph + FR layout
dom_genes <- V(gwas_subg)$name[comp$membership == large_comp]
dom_subg  <- induced_subgraph(gwas_subg, vids = dom_genes)
set.seed(42)
lo_dom    <- layout_with_fr(dom_subg)
dom_sizes <- scale_node_size(V(dom_subg)$name, di_named)
dom_pch   <- ifelse(V(dom_subg)$name %in% art_names, 18L, 21L)

# Secondary components
sec_cols <- c("#D6604D", "#66BD63", "#F4A582")   # 8-gene, 3-gene, 2-gene
sec_list <- lapply(seq_along(sec_comp_ids), function(i) {
  cid   <- sec_comp_ids[i]
  genes <- V(gwas_subg)$name[comp$membership == cid]
  subg  <- induced_subgraph(gwas_subg, vids = genes)
  lo    <- if (vcount(subg) == 2) {
    matrix(c(-1, 0, 1, 0), nrow = 2)   # fixed layout for 2-node graphs
  } else {
    set.seed(42); layout_with_fr(subg)
  }
  list(subg  = subg,
       lo    = lo,
       sizes = scale_node_size(V(subg)$name, di_named),
       pch   = ifelse(V(subg)$name %in% art_names, 18L, 21L),
       col   = sec_cols[i],
       n     = vcount(subg))
})

cat("Panel sizes — dominant:", vcount(dom_subg),
    "| secondary:", paste(sapply(sec_list, `[[`, "n"), collapse = ", "),
    "| singletons:", sum(comp$csize == 1), "\n")
```

```{r fig6-plot}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 10

.draw_comp <- function(subg, lo, sizes, pch_vec, fill_col,
                       title_str, label_cex = 0.7,
                       mar = c(0.5, 0.5, 1.8, 0.5)) {
  par(mar = mar)
  plot(subg,
       layout             = lo,
       vertex.shape       = "none",
       vertex.label       = V(subg)$name,
       vertex.label.cex   = label_cex,
       vertex.label.color = "black",
       vertex.label.dist  = 0.55,
       edge.color         = "grey40",
       edge.width         = 1.5,
       edge.arrow.size    = 0,
       main               = title_str)
  points(lo[, 1], lo[, 2],
         pch = pch_vec, bg = fill_col, col = fill_col,
         cex = sizes / 4)
}

.plot_fig6 <- function() {
  # Outer bottom margin for singleton annotation
  par(oma = c(2, 0, 0, 0))

  # layout(): dominant (panel 1) spans columns 1-2 of all 3 rows → ~67% width
  layout(matrix(c(1, 1, 2,
                  1, 1, 3,
                  1, 1, 4), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE))

  # --- Panel 1: Dominant component (24 genes) ---
  .draw_comp(
    dom_subg, lo_dom, dom_sizes, dom_pch, "#2166AC",
    title_str = paste0("Dominant component  (n = ", vcount(dom_subg), ")"),
    label_cex = 0.7,
    mar       = c(1, 1, 2.5, 1)
  )

  # Legend inside dominant panel
  legend("bottomleft",
         legend = c("Regular gene", "Articulation point",
                    paste0("Dominant (n = ",         vcount(dom_subg),        ")"),
                    paste0("Component 2 (n = ",      sec_list[[1]]$n,         ")"),
                    paste0("Component 3 (n = ",      sec_list[[2]]$n,         ")"),
                    paste0("Component 4 (n = ",      sec_list[[3]]$n,         ")")),
         pch    = c(21, 18, 21, 21, 21, 21),
         pt.bg  = c("grey50", "grey50",
                    "#2166AC", sec_list[[1]]$col,
                    sec_list[[2]]$col, sec_list[[3]]$col),
         col    = c("grey50", "grey50",
                    "#2166AC", sec_list[[1]]$col,
                    sec_list[[2]]$col, sec_list[[3]]$col),
         pt.cex = 1.4, bty = "n", cex = 0.72)

  # --- Panels 2-4: Secondary components ---
  sec_titles <- c(
    paste0("8-gene component"),
    paste0("3-gene component"),
    paste0("2-gene component")
  )
  for (i in seq_along(sec_list)) {
    sl <- sec_list[[i]]
    .draw_comp(sl$subg, sl$lo, sl$sizes, sl$pch, sl$col,
               title_str = sec_titles[i],
               label_cex = 0.68)
  }

  # Singleton annotation in outer bottom margin
  mtext(paste0("78 singleton genes not shown (no within-set edges)"),
        side = 1, outer = TRUE, line = 0.6,
        cex = 0.82, col = "grey40", adj = 0.5)
}

# Save PNG
png(here("figures", "fig6_crc_network.png"),
    width = 12, height = 10, units = "in", res = 300)
.plot_fig6()
invisible(dev.off())

# Save PDF
pdf(here("figures", "fig6_crc_network.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
.plot_fig6()
invisible(dev.off())

# Display inline
.plot_fig6()
```

---

## Figure 7 — CRC Signal Attribution

```{r fig7-comp-jackknife}
#| cache: true
#| cache-path: "_cache/fig7"

# Re-establish graph prep (prep_graph_fast returns $g, $A, $nodes)
prep  <- prep_graph_fast(g)
A     <- prep$A
nodes <- prep$nodes

# Full-set p-value (10-bin degree-matched null, 1000 perms)
set.seed(42)
n_perm_fig6 <- 1000
rand_full <- numeric(n_perm_fig6)
for (i in seq_len(n_perm_fig6)) {
  s      <- sample_degree_matched(gwas_on_net, bin_cache,
                                   num_bins = 10, replace = TRUE)
  idx_s  <- match(s, nodes)
  x_s    <- integer(length(nodes)); x_s[idx_s] <- 1L
  rand_full[i] <- global_moran_I(A, x_s)
}
p_full <- mean(rand_full >= I_full)
cat("p_full:", p_full, "\n")

# Component jackknife: remove each non-trivial component, recompute p
non_trivial_comps <- sort(unique(comp$membership[comp$csize[comp$membership] > 1]))

comp_jack_list <- lapply(non_trivial_comps, function(cid) {
  comp_genes <- V(gwas_subg)$name[comp$membership == cid]
  reduced    <- setdiff(gwas_on_net, comp_genes)

  if (length(reduced) < 3) {
    return(tibble(comp_id = cid, comp_size = length(comp_genes),
                  p_minus_C = NA_real_))
  }

  idx_r  <- match(reduced, nodes)
  x_obs  <- integer(length(nodes)); x_obs[idx_r] <- 1L
  I_obs  <- global_moran_I(A, x_obs)

  set.seed(42L + cid)
  rand_c <- numeric(n_perm_fig6)
  for (i in seq_len(n_perm_fig6)) {
    s     <- sample_degree_matched(reduced, bin_cache,
                                    num_bins = 10, replace = TRUE)
    idx_s <- match(s, nodes)
    x_s   <- integer(length(nodes)); x_s[idx_s] <- 1L
    rand_c[i] <- global_moran_I(A, x_s)
  }

  tibble(comp_id   = cid,
         comp_size = length(comp_genes),
         p_minus_C = mean(rand_c >= I_obs))
})

comp_jack_df <- bind_rows(comp_jack_list) |>
  mutate(
    delta_p     = p_minus_C - p_full,
    comp_label  = paste0("Comp ", comp_id, " (n=", comp_size, ")"),
    is_dominant = comp_id == large_comp
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(comp_size))

cat("Component jackknife results:\n")
print(comp_jack_df[, c("comp_label", "p_minus_C", "delta_p", "is_dominant")])
```

```{r fig7-plot}
# Significance-shift threshold: Δp where p_{-C} = 0.05
thresh_delta <- 0.05 - p_full

p6a <- ggplot(comp_jack_df |>
                mutate(comp_label = fct_reorder(comp_label, comp_size)),
              aes(x = comp_label, y = delta_p, fill = is_dominant)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = thresh_delta, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "red", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.6, y = thresh_delta,
           label = "p = 0.05 threshold", hjust = 0, vjust = -0.4,
           size = 2.8, colour = "red") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2166AC", "FALSE" = "grey70"),
                    guide = "none") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = expression(Delta*italic(p) == italic(p)[-C] - italic(p)[full]),
       title = "Component jackknife") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

# Panel B: gene jackknife for dominant component only
dom_genes <- gene_jack_df |>
  filter(comp_id == large_comp) |>
  mutate(gene = fct_reorder(gene, delta_I))

p6b <- ggplot(dom_genes,
              aes(x = delta_I, y = gene, fill = is_art)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2166AC", "FALSE" = "grey70"),
                    labels = c("TRUE" = "Articulation point", "FALSE" = "Other gene"),
                    name = NULL) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta*italic(I)[i] == italic(I)[full] - italic(I)[-i]),
       y = NULL,
       title = paste0("Gene-level jackknife (dominant component, n = ",
                      max(comp$csize), ")")) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7.5))

fig7 <- p6a + p6b +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

fig7
save_fig("fig7_crc_attribution", fig7, width = 11, height = 6)
```

---

## Final Output Summary

```{r summary}
fig_files <- list.files(here("figures"),
                        pattern = "\\.(png|pdf)$",
                        full.names = TRUE)

summary_df <- tibble(file = fig_files) |>
  mutate(
    name      = basename(file),
    ext       = tools::file_ext(file),
    size_kb   = round(file.size(file) / 1024, 1)
  ) |>
  filter(grepl("^fig[0-9]", name)) |>
  arrange(name)

if (nrow(summary_df) > 0) {
  # Retrieve PNG dimensions
  get_dims <- function(f) {
    if (tools::file_ext(f) == "png") {
      info <- tryCatch(
        {
          d <- png::readPNG(f, native = FALSE, info = TRUE)
          attr(d, "info")[c("width", "height")]
        },
        error = function(e) list(width = NA, height = NA)
      )
      paste0(info$width, " × ", info$height, " px")
    } else {
      "—"
    }
  }

  summary_df <- summary_df |>
    mutate(dimensions = vapply(file, get_dims, character(1)))

  cat("\nFigures saved to figures/:\n\n")
  print(
    summary_df |>
      select(name, ext, size_kb, dimensions) |>
      as.data.frame(),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
} else {
  cat("No figure files found in figures/\n")
}
```
